title: rural society
description: This is a Minecraft integration package that optimizes the gaming experience of the village
body:
# Reconstruct the village
Have you grown weary of the millennia-unchanged villages and landscapes across the continent?The "Rural Society" modpack will completely awaken this dormant world for you. We've primarily focused our efforts on villages as the foundation of civilization. The modpack not only significantly increases village varieties but fundamentally rebuilds vanilla villages from the ground up. They are no longer mere functional trading posts, but warm homelands carrying living stories.

## Exploring the Unknown World
Beyond the spark of civilization lies a vast unknown waiting to be discovered.We've incorporated numerous carefully designed structure generation mods. From mysterious forest relics to magnificent underground halls, each exploration step may bring unexpected surprises or dangers, making every journey into the wilderness a thrilling adventure.

## Introducing Modern Firearms
To meet new challenges,the rules of the era must evolve accordingly. The modpack prominently introduces firearm mods. When civilization's hearth smoke coexists with wilderness dangers, these modern weapons become your most reliable companions. Whether defending village peace or conquering uncharted territories, the fire erupting from gun barrels will write new survival laws for you.

## A new dimension
The [AE](The Aether) mod opens up a dimension suspended in the eternal twilight for you. On the shattered floating continent, the Cloud Stone Castle and the Flying Feather Village stand still in the clouds. Here, you will ride a cloud whale to explore the Thunder Temple in the eye of the storm, collect starlight crystals, and uncover the ancient mystery that connects heaven and earth.

# Becoming a New World Pioneer
Here,you are both a witness to rural society and a pioneer of the steel order. The "Rural Society" modpack creates a world where tradition and modernity collide, offering endless possibilities for adventure and creation. Welcome to this whole new chapter and begin writing your unique legend today.
